title: Tesla FSD Subscriptions Show Strong Growth in Q1 Earnings
text: Tesla's earnings report highlighted impressive Full Self-Driving (Supervised) subscription growth of 51% year-over-year to 1.28 million active users, up from 1.10 million previous quarter. Subscription growth outpaced vehicle delivery growth of 6% annually. However, adoption remains early with only 14% of Tesla's 9.2 million cumulative deliveries subscribing. Services revenue jumped 42% year-over-year to $3.75 billion, now 17% of total revenue. Gross margin improved to 21.1% from 16.3% year prior. Free cash flow reached $1.44 billion, more than doubling prior year's $664 million. Tesla demonstrates successful transition toward business model less dependent on automotive sales, with vehicles still accounting for 73% of quarterly revenue.
